Name: TemperatureDelta
Description: Float-based grill temperature delta in degrees Celsius

Description: Negative variance used when inventory shrinks unexpectedly

Name: RevisionSequence

Name: QualityRating
Description: Overall kitchen quality score from 1 to 10

Name: LegacyStationCode
